name: Potential Active Directory Reconnaissance/Enumeration Via LDAP
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Adeem Mawani
SIGMA Title: Potential Active Directory Reconnaissance/Enumeration Via LDAP
SIGMA Description: Detects potential Active Directory enumeration via LDAP

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((("Event ID"=30 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(grouptype:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2147483648)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(grouptype:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2147483656)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(grouptype:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2147483652)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(grouptype:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2147483650)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=805306369)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=805306368)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=536870913)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=536870912)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=268435457)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(samaccounttype=268435456)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=grouppolicycontainer)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=organizationalunit)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=computer)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=ntdsdsa)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=server)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=domain)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=person)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=group)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectcategory=user)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectclass=trusteddomain)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectclass=computer)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectclass=server)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectclass=group)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectclass=user)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(primarygroupid=521)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(primarygroupid=516)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(primarygroupid=515)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(primarygroupid=512)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%domain admins%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%objectguid=*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(schemaidguid=*)%')) AND (NOT(("Event ID"=30 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(domainsid=%)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(objectsid=%)%'))))) OR ("Event ID"=30 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=4194304)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2097152)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%!(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=1048574)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=524288)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=65536)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=8192)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=544)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%!(useraccountcontrol:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=2)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msds-allowedtoactonbehalfofotheridentity%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msds-allowedtodelegateto%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msds-groupmanagedserviceaccount%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(accountexpires=9223372036854775807)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(accountexpires=0)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%(admincount=1)%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ms-mcs-admpwd%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Active Directory Reconnaissance/Enumeration Via LDAP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
